name: captapi
title: Captapi - Social Media Data (27 platforms, BYO key)
description: Bring your own Captapi API key. Calls the Captapi REST API (no scraping) for transcripts, AI summaries, comments, stats, search, downloads and account usage across 170 operations across 27 platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, X, Reddit, Threads, Bluesky, Pinterest, LinkedIn, Rumble, Truth Social, Kick, Kwai, Komi, Pillar, Linkbio, Linkme, Amazon Shop).
